name: farky-memory-container
description: Quiet-by-default capability container for agent skills, subagents, hooks, fallback reporting, and lightweight durable learning.

interface.shortDescription: Capability router and no-silent-fallback layer for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: farky-memory-container packages a lightweight agent memory and capability reflex: start prompts, skill routing, fallback reporting, session close, memory routing, subagent prompts, hook specs, and project templates. It is quiet during normal work and explicit when a planned capability cannot run.
defaultPrompt: Use contAIner quietly; report only real fallback.
Audit contAIner capability routing and capability drift.
